params.name: Lu Ban Lock
params.description:
On Nov 19, 221 AD, Lu Ban Lock gradually began to become popular among the people.
Lu Ban Lock, also known as Kongming Lock or Bagua Lock, is a toy made based on ancient Chinese carpentry joints. The most common type consists of six wooden columns and has a special structure that is easy to disassemble and difficult to assemble. It is beneficial for relaxing the body and mind and developing the brain.
